context: Edge case: AI-assisted PR removing error handling

checklist.name: Detects AI authorship
checklist.description: Detects that the PR was AI-assisted via Co-Authored-By commit trailers

checklist.name: Catches removed error handling
checklist.description: Identifies that the PR removes error checking (if err != nil blocks) which will cause silent failures and potential panics

checklist.name: Catches removed context propagation
checklist.description: Identifies that replacing real contexts with context.Background() breaks cancellation, timeout, and tracing

checklist.name: Risk classified red
checklist.description: PR is classified as red despite the innocuous title — the changes are dangerous
